seoTitle: Obi Obi vs Ocean View — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Obi Obi and Ocean View. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Obi Obi vs Ocean View: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Obi Obi and Ocean View.
heading: Obi Obi vs Ocean View — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Obi Obi, Queensland and Ocean View, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ocean View has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Obi Obi (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Obi Obi or Ocean View safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Obi Obi has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Ocean View scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Obi Obi scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Ocean View scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Obi Obi or Ocean View?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ocean View has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
